analysis.consistency: The data appears internally consistent with standard D&D 5e spell formatting. All required fields for a spell entity are present and filled.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is detailed and covers suspension, weight limit, movement mechanics (push/pull climbing, altitude change), duration constraints (Concentration), and safe landing upon spell termination. The component material description is specific.

mechanics.movement_control: Requires external fixed surface for movement (like climbing) unless self-targeted. Caster can use action (or move action if self-targeted) to change altitude up to 20 feet per turn.

analysis.notes: The spell handles both unwilling creatures (via save) and objects, providing clear constraints on weight and movement capabilities while suspended. The dual class availability (sorcerer, wizard) is noted.
